rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to choose or enter a withdrawal amount.
The system shall support predefined amounts for selection by the user.
The system shall allow users to input their own custom withdrawal amount.
The system shall provide an option for the user to cancel the transaction at any point.
The system shall support if the user cancels the transaction, the system shall stop the transaction and return the card.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should allow users to choose or enter a withdrawal amount.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: In an ATM, the user is asked to choose or enter the amount of money they want to withdraw.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should support predefined amounts for selection by the user.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can either select a predefined amount or type in a custom amount.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should allow users to input their own custom withdrawal amount.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can either select a predefined amount or type in a custom amount.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should provide an option for the user to cancel the transaction at any point.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At any point during this process, the user can cancel the operation.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the user cancels the transaction, the system should stop the transaction and return the card.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they do, the ATM stops the transaction and returns the card.
